mapper.sql: aaar.start_time, aaar.end_time, aaar.execution_status, aaar.execution_time, aaar.attribute1, aaar.attribute2, aaar.attribute3, aaar.attribute4, aaar.attribute5, aaar.id, aaar.create_by, aaar.update_time, aaar.update_by, aaar.create_time

${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.execution_status as ${tAlias}_execution_status, ${tAlias}.execution_time as ${tAlias}_execution_time, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_abnormal_attendance_record (start_time, end_time, execution_status, execution_time, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, update_time, update_by, create_time) values (#{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{executionStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_abnormal_attendance_record set start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, execution_status = #{executionStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, execution_time = #{executionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select top 1 * from ac_abnormal_attendance_record where execution_status = 'SUCCESS' order by id desc
